about: ShopEase is Egypt's fastest-growing e-commerce platform, offering electronics, appliances, beauty products, and more. We deliver to all 27 governorates with same-day delivery available in Cairo and Giza.

contact.support_hours: Saturday–Thursday: 9 AM – 10 PM | Friday: 12 PM – 8 PM

store_locations.name: ShopEase Cairo Festival City
store_locations.address: Cairo Festival City Mall, Ring Road, New Cairo, Cairo
store_locations.hours: Sunday–Thursday: 10 AM – 11 PM | Friday–Saturday: 10 AM – Midnight
store_locations.parking: Free parking for 3 hours with purchase

store_locations.name: ShopEase Heliopolis
store_locations.address: City Stars Mall, Omar Ibn El Khattab St, Heliopolis, Cairo
store_locations.hours: Sunday–Thursday: 10 AM – 11 PM | Friday–Saturday: 10 AM – Midnight

store_locations.name: ShopEase Giza
store_locations.address: Dandy Mall, Waslet Dahshur Road, 6th of October City, Giza

store_locations.name: ShopEase Alexandria
store_locations.address: San Stefano Grand Plaza, Smouha, Alexandria

same_day_delivery.note: Order before 2 PM for same-day delivery in Cairo and Giza

payment_methods: Credit/Debit Card (Visa, Mastercard) — secure online payment
Bank Instalment Plans — 0% interest for 12 months on orders above EGP 5,000 (Banque Misr, CIB, QNB)

promotions.name: Mega Friday Sale
promotions.description: Up to 70% off on electronics, appliances, and beauty products every last Friday of the month.

promotions.name: New Customer Welcome Gift
promotions.description: First-time ShopEase customers get 10% off their first order + free shipping.

promotions.name: ShopEase VIP Loyalty Programme
promotions.description: Earn 1 point per EGP spent. Redeem points for discounts — 1000 points = EGP 50 off. VIP members get exclusive early access to sales.

promotions.name: Student Discount
promotions.description: Verified students get 15% off on laptops, tablets, and accessories year-round.

website_help.login_issues: If you can't log in, click 'Forgot Password' on the login page and enter your registered email. You'll receive a reset link within 2 minutes. If the issue persists, contact our support team on 19123.
website_help.payment_failed: If your payment fails: (1) Check that your card details are correct. (2) Ensure your card has sufficient balance. (3) Contact your bank to confirm the transaction is not blocked. (4) Try an alternative payment method like Fawry or Cash on Delivery.
website_help.account_blocked: If your account is blocked, this may be due to suspicious activity. Please call 19123 or email support@shopease.eg with your registered phone number for verification.
website_help.order_not_showing: If your order doesn't appear in your account after placing it, wait 5–10 minutes and refresh. If it still doesn't show, contact support with your payment confirmation reference number.
website_help.promo_code_not_working: Ensure the promo code is entered exactly as provided (case-sensitive). Check the expiry date and that the items in your cart are eligible. Some codes require a minimum order amount.
